AUTH.HERO_SUBHEAD: Manage reservations, tables, staff, and WhatsApp automation from a clear and secure dashboard.
AUTH.OWNER_HIGHLIGHT: Control restaurant settings, team access, and the full operation.
AUTH.MANAGER_HIGHLIGHT: Supervise reservations, tables, shifts, and daily service.
AUTH.LOGIN_DESCRIPTION: Sign in with your restaurant credentials to access the dashboard.
AUTH.RESET_PASSWORD_HELP: Enter a secure password to recover access to your dashboard.
AUTH.RESET_SUCCESS_DESCRIPTION: You can now sign in with your new password.
AUTH.PASSWORD_MINLENGTH: Password must meet the security policy.
AUTH.RESET_ERROR_NO_TOKEN: This link does not include a valid token.
AUTH.RESET_ERROR_EXPIRED: This link expired or was already used.
AUTH.ERROR_NETWORK: Could not connect to the server.
AUTH.LOGIN_GENERIC_ERROR: The operation could not be completed. Try again.
